meaning: n.烦琐哲学,墨守成规,循规蹈矩,经院哲学
examples: Promote materialist dialectics and oppose metaphysics and scholasticism.
Scholasticism is a term used to designate both a method and a system.
Promote materialist dialectics and oppose metaphysics and scholasticism .
There were tirades against Aristotle and scholasticism, aimed at the universities.
